markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.621 — Motorcyclist Safety and Share the Road Campaign

From funds appropriated for that purpose, the department shall conduct a continuing public awareness campaign to promote motorcyclist safety and the concept of sharing the road with motorcyclists.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 1391 (S.B.1967), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2009.*

subsections.text: From funds appropriated for that purpose, the department shall conduct a continuing public awareness campaign to promote motorcyclist safety and the concept of sharing the road with motorcyclists.
